cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question about Wu Jinyou. First, I need to read the passage carefully to find the relevant information. The question asks which statement is true about Wu Jinyou. The options are A, B, C, D. Let me go through the text again. Looking at the part where Wu Jinyou is mentioned: "Wu Jinyou, head of the Polar Research Institute of China, and the group's leader, said, 'I hope the students have not only a field trip to the Yellow River station, but are also touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers here. I also expect in the future, some of them will choose to devote themselves to polar research and maybe even work with us.'" From this, we can see that Wu Jinyou is the head of the Polar Research Institute of China and the leader of the group. He mentions that he hopes the students are touched by the devotion and spirit of the researchers. This directly relates to option C: "He thinks highly of the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers." That seems correct because he emphasizes their devotion and spirit. Options A and B mention Dalian Marinetime University. The text says Zheng Li is a student from there, but there's no mention of Wu Jinyou being a graduate or president of that university. So A and B are incorrect. Option D says he's sure all ten
